chunks.text: Technical Reports - 1967. Homogeneous Gauss-Markov Random Fields (M239) by E. Wong. Stability of Linear Time-Invariant Systems (M238) by C.A. Desoer and M.Y. Wu. Invariant Recognition of Geometric Shapes (M237) by J. Alan Steppe and Eugene Wong. On Second-Order Necessary Conditions of Optimality (M234) by E.J. Messerli and E. Polak. Comparison of the Efficiency of Incoherent and Coherent Light Sources in a Photosynthetic Reaction (M233) by Ibrahim Garro and Charles Susskind.

State Variables and Feedback Theory (M232) by E.S. Kuh. Studies in Pursuit-Evasion Differential Games (M230) by Noboru Sugino. Stability Criteria For Nonlinear RLC Networks (M229) by M. Goldstein and H. Frank. Mating Responses Related to Antenna Condition in the Corn Earworm Moth, Heliothis Zea (Boddie) (M228) by James K. Windsor Jr. Iterative Design Procedures in Pattern Classification (M227) by Lineu da Costa Barbosa.

Stability of Multiple-loop Feedback Linear Time-Invariant Systems (M226) by C.A. Desoer and M.Y. Wu. An Algorithm for Minimum Energy Control (M225) by E. Polak and M. Deparis. Second Order Conditions of Optimally For Constrained Optimization Problems in Finite Dimensional Spaces (M224) by E. Polak and E.J. Messerli. An Algorithm for Computing the Jordan Canonical Form of a Matrix (M223) by E. Polak. Synthesis of Impulse Response Matrices by Internally Stable and Passive Realizations (M222) by L.M. Silverman.

Homomorphisms Between Stochastic Sequential Machines and Related Problems (M221) by A. Paz. Sensitivity Invariants of Continuously Equivalent Networks (M220) by E.S. Kuh and C.G. Lau. On Free Monoids Partially Ordered By Embedding (M219) by Leonard H. Haines. Optimum Synthesis of a Class of Multiple Loop Feedback Systems (M218) by R.N. Biswas and E.S. Kuh. A Multi-Parameter Sensitivity Measure for Linear Systems (M217) by R.N. Biswas and E.S. Kuh.

On Linear Sampled-Data Feedback Systems with Finite Pulse Width (M216) by E.I. Jury and P.F. Kan. Small Signal Behavior of Nonlinear Networks (M214) by C.A. Desoer and K.K. Wong. Experiment on Stable and Unstable Flute Oscillations in a Scaled Down Mirror Machine (M213) by T.Y. Chang. Capacity of Classes of Gaussian Channels Part II: Continuous Time (M212) by W.L. Root and P.P. Varaiya. On Finite Dimensional Approximations to a Class of Games (M211) by J-P Jacob and E. Polak.

Controllability, Observability and Stability of Linear Systems (M210) by L.M. Silverman and B.D.O. Anderson. Common Terminal Multicommodity Flow (M209) by B. Rothfarb, N.P. Shein and I.T. Frisch. Capacity of Classes of Gaussian Channels Part I: Discrete-Time (M208) by W.L. Root and P.P. Varaiya. Riemann-Stieltjes Approximations of Stochastic Integrals (M207) by E. Wong and M. Zakai. Perturbations of Optimal and Sub-Optimal Control Problems (M206) by L. Forys and P. Varaiya.

Bounds on the Responses of Nonlinear Control Systems (M205) by Ralph Iwens. Internal and External Stability of Linear Systems (M204) by Leonard H. Haines and Leonard M. Silverman. Vulnerability of Communication Networks (M203) by H. Frank. Emission and Absorption of Cyclotron Radiation By a Hot Electron Plasma (M202) by S. Sesnic, D. Tuma, A.J. Lichtenberg and A.W. Trivelpiece. Asymptotic Stability in the Large of a Class of a Single-loop Feedback Systems (M201) by R.A. Baker and C.A. Desoer.

Scanning Electron Microscope Investigation of Planar Diffused P-N Junction Profiles Near the Edge of a Diffusion Mask (M199) by N.C. MacDonald and T.E. Everhart. Integrated Circuits Laboratory Manual (M197) by H.E. Abraham. An Electron Beam Activated Charge Device and Associated Memory (M195) by N.C. MacDonald and T.E. Everhart.
